nasb.text: The Lord will answer and say to His people, “Behold, I am going to send you grain, new wine and oil, And you will be satisfied in full with them; And I will never again make you a reproach among the nations.

esv.text: The Lord answered and said to his people, “Behold, I am sending to you grain, wine, and oil, and you will be satisfied; and I will no more make you a reproach among the nations.

cnv.text: 耶和華應允他的子民，對他們說： “看哪！我必賜給你們 五穀、新酒和新油， 你們必吃得飽足， 我必不再使你們 成為列國中的羞辱。

ccb.text: 祂回应他们说： “我必赐五谷、新酒和油给你们， 使你们饱足， 不再让你们受列国的羞辱。
